heading: University based research and development grant program
label: 17256 University based research and development grant program
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with other appropriate agencies, shall establish a university based research and development program to study carbon capture and sequestration using the various types of coal.

children.heading: Rural and agricultural institutions
children.label: b Rural and agricultural institutions
children.text: The Secretary shall give special consideration to rural or agricultural based institutions in areas that have regional sources of coal and that offer interdisciplinary programs in the area of environmental science to study carbon capture and sequestration.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are to be authorized to be appropriated $10,000,000 to carry out this section.
